name: computation
description: Open computation stage contract for input preparation, validation, dry-run, optional execution, and job/output records.
intent: Prepare, validate, optionally run, and record computational simulation jobs with dry-run-first safety gates.
handoff_notes: Record what was run, where it was run, with which inputs, which hashes were approved, and whether outputs are complete.
risk_notes: Do not submit real jobs without approval and do not record unfinished jobs as completed.
